content: Events. <onlyinclude Summary. The <a href="American%20Revolution" American Revolution</a begins this year, with the first military engagement being the April 19 <a href="Battles%20of%20Lexington%20and%20Concord" Battles of Lexington and Concord</a on the day after <a href="Paul%20Revere" Paul Revere</a's now-legendary ride.
